2245980.name: -HYPERDOPE-
2245980.description:
Hyperdope is the Sims meets Eraserhead.
Stardew Valley meets Raytheon.
It's the digital manifestation of my personal and sociopolitical anxieties.

-Scrounge
Hyperdope is an urban survival roguelite.
Earn money to buy furniture.
Earn furniture to buy a better quality of life.

Play it steady and earn a meager sum...
...Or roll the dice of life and become a winner for eternity.
But be careful If you die you lose it all*.

*Treasured belongings can be insured for COOL DOLLARS so that they will live forever, even though you won't.

-Morality²
Your alignment determines your dialogue options, which in turn affects your alignment. There are no good deeds in this universe, existence is violence.

-Relationships.
Make friends with the other morons who didn't leave the war zone when they had the chance.
You're nothing without a support network, and hey, your buddies probably know some things that you don't.
Not everyone sees eye to eye though so pick your friends wisely, they talk about you behind your back.

-No skill trees??.
We all know personal growth in this world can be bought. Invest in yourself with cybernetics.
2245980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
